parsed_denial_summary: Synthetic denial states prior preferred therapy documentation was not clear enough for approval.

rescue_strategy.rationale: Policy Section 2.4 requires two preferred therapy outcomes, and mapping-step-therapy references synthetic medication history for two prior therapies.
requested_actions: Attach medication history excerpt showing Preferred Therapy A inadequate response.
Attach medication history excerpt showing Preferred Therapy B intolerance.
Ask clinician reviewer to confirm no unsupported severity or necessity statement was added.

unsupported_claim_warnings: Do not state medical necessity beyond the cited synthetic medication history and clinician-approved severity attestation.
audit_summary: Denial Rescue Agent mapped denial STEP_THERAPY_INCOMPLETE to the step_therapy rescue strategy.
